task_completion.description: Agent opened and read the rail manifest file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '~/Desktop/rail_manifest.txt' with the list of five chemicals.

task_completion.description: Agent accessed the CAMEO Chemicals website.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser open and navigated to 'https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/'.

task_completion.description: Agent created the security audit report file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor open, editing a file named 'tih_security_audit.txt' located in the '~/Documents/' directory.

task_completion.description: Agent correctly identified and recorded the TIH zones for Phosgene and Chlorine.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The audit report contains the exact text 'Phosgene: ZONE A' and 'Chlorine: ZONE B'.

task_completion.description: Agent correctly identified and recorded the TIH zones for Bromine and Allyl Alcohol.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The audit report contains the exact text 'Bromine: ZONE A' and 'Allyl Alcohol: ZONE B'.

task_completion.description: Agent correctly identified that Toluene is not a TIH chemical and recorded it as NONE.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The audit report contains the exact text 'Toluene: NONE'.

integrity.description: Agent used a graphical web browser to search the database rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser (like Chrome or Firefox) being used to search CAMEO Chemicals, not terminal commands like curl or wget.

integrity.description: Agent actually viewed the chemical datasheets to find the information.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent viewing specific CAMEO chemical datasheets (e.g., UN1076, UN1017) rather than hallucinating the answers from its own training data.

integrity.description: Agent used an interactive text editor to create the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: The output file 'tih_security_audit.txt' is seen being edited in a text editor (GUI or interactive terminal editor like nano/vim), rather than being generated via a single automated script or echo command.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Ground truth TIH Zones based on CAMEO Chemicals: Phosgene is ZONE A (UN1076), Chlorine is ZONE B (UN1017), Bromine is ZONE A (UN1744), Allyl Alcohol is ZONE B (UN1098), and Toluene is NONE (UN1294, it is a Class 3 Flammable Liquid, not a Toxic Inhalation Hazard). The expected format in the output file is 'Chemical: ZONE X' or 'Chemical: NONE'.
